title: Craft Complete
description: Complete crafting recipes such as name tags, dyes, and others.
body:
This **datapack** adds balanced alternative and quality-of-life **crafting recipes** to Minecraft, making progression smoother and resource management more convenient while staying close to the vanilla experience.

## Examples of recipes included in the datapack
![green_dye](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de7558155c4788770ea17f1f44d4105a0840573e.png)

![item_frame_recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63c2f140974dda22c52e29d6b71343d05c7c7c4f.png)

![chipped_anvil_repair_recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/288d651d617391310b7c980397f8ae7f0dd45ae1.png)

![diamond_horse_armor_recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/398db6c20a6880a4606b2e986544c262fd02ef53.png)

![name_tag_recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f28b08209d8f3f2d2afa8d7eb42fab0953bdfc41.png)

## For more, check out the gallery.
